---
title: "1.5-data-cleaning-BRT"
author: "Julian Beckert"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries & datasets

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# All datasets created/adjusted with ArcGIS
# BRT stops intersecting with census tracts

brt_stops_tracts <- read_csv("BRT_stops_all_with_census_tracts.csv")

# Residential buildings 1/2 and 1/4 mile from a BRT stop
homes_halfmile_brt_stop <- read_csv("halfmile_from_proposed_brt_stop.csv")
homes_quartermile_brt_stop <- read_csv("quartermile_from_proposed_brt_stop.csv")

# Join to the residential buildings dataset including distances to existing bus routes/stops
residentialhomes_existingbus <- read_csv("residentialbuildings_distances_census.csv")
```

## Homes near routes

```{r}
# clean first
clean_homes_halfmile_brt_stop <- homes_halfmile_brt_stop %>% 
  select(-CONDO_UNIT, -CLERK_PLAT, -PARCEL_NO) %>% 
  distinct(ACCT, .keep_all = TRUE)
clean_homes_quartermile_brt_stop <- homes_quartermile_brt_stop %>% 
  select(-CONDO_UNIT, -CLERK_PLAT, -PARCEL_NO) %>% 
  distinct(ACCT, .keep_all = TRUE)
# residentialhomes_existingbus is already clean

# add distance binary columns
clean_homes_halfmile_brt_stop <- clean_homes_halfmile_brt_stop %>% 
  mutate(
    halfmile_BRT_stop = 1
  )
clean_homes_quartermile_brt_stop <- clean_homes_quartermile_brt_stop %>% 
  mutate(
    quartermile_BRT_stop = 1
  )

# start joining
residential_BRT_half <- left_join(residentialhomes_existingbus, 
                         clean_homes_halfmile_brt_stop %>% 
                           select(ACCT, halfmile_BRT_stop))
# replace new NAs created by the join with 0
residential_BRT_half$halfmile_BRT_stop[is.na(residential_BRT_half$halfmile_BRT_stop)] <- 0
# next join
residential_BRT <- left_join(residential_BRT_half, 
                             clean_homes_quartermile_brt_stop %>% 
                               select(ACCT, quartermile_BRT_stop))
# replace new NAs created by the join with 0
residential_BRT$quartermile_BRT_stop[is.na(residential_BRT$quartermile_BRT_stop)] <- 0

# download
# write_csv(residential_BRT, "residentialbuilidings_BRT_distance_census_tracts.csv")
```

## BRT + tracts

routes and tracts & stops and tracts

```{r}
clean_brt_stops_tracts <- brt_stops_tracts %>% 
  filter(STATUS == "Planned") %>% 
    select(-Join_Count, -TARGET_FID, -JOIN_FID, -ID, -NAME, -STATEFP, -COUNTYFP, -GEOID, -NAMELSAD, -MTFCC, -FUNCSTAT, -ALAND, -AWATER) %>% 
  rename_at("INTPTLAT",~"STOPLAT") %>% 
  rename_at("INTPTLON",~"STOPLON")

distinct_brt_stops_tracts <- clean_brt_stops_tracts %>% 
  rename_at("GEOIDFQ", ~ "Geography") %>%
  distinct(
    Geography, STATION_NA, 
    .keep_all = TRUE)

number_of_brt_stops <- distinct_brt_stops_tracts %>% 
  group_by(Geography) %>% 
  summarise(
    brt_stops = n_distinct(STATION_NA)
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    has_brt_stop = 1
  )

# write_csv(number_of_brt_stops, "brt_stop_statistics.csv")
```
